dispatch_policy: Do not create Codex image-generation threads until art approval is granted for asset-index.json and series-art-image-prompts.json.
history_policy: Final approved images write to canonical output paths. Retained non-final candidates must be moved to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes. Never create v1/, v2/, versions/, or drafts/ directories.

output_format_contract.rule: Thread workers must read each prompt output_format and generate the requested card or board, not a final video frame unless the asset subtype is reference_frame or shot_override.

batches.title: 全剧风格板
batches.dependency_reason: Root visual system must be approved before all other master assets.
batches.retry_policy: After approval, generate 1-3 candidates per asset only when needed; keep one final file at output_path and archive retained alternatives in history/ with version suffixes.

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
style rules are concrete enough to guide downstream cards
does not contain ComfyUI node or sampler parameters

batches.thread_prompt: After art approval, generate final raster assets for 全剧风格板. Use only the approved prompt records listed in prompt_ids. Write confirmed final images to the exact output paths listed in output_paths. Archive retained non-final candidates in sibling history/ directories using .v001, .v002 suffixes before the file extension. Do not create version folders. Return a compact manifest of final_files, history_files, blocked_items, and QC notes. Honor each prompt's output_format object exactly: file format, minimum resolution, background policy, alpha policy, canvas aspect ratio, required views, composition layers, and QC checks. Reusable character, prop, costume, location, and style assets are master cards or boards, not final video frames; transparent cutouts must be planned as separate PNG/SVG deliverables when needed.

batches.title: 服装系统

basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
costume layers and material thickness remain readable
the intended body type and faction or region are clear
not treated as a final video frame

batches.title: 核心道具与精确符号
batches.dependency_reason: Props and exact symbols depend on approved style, owner identity cards, Sumin hierarchy, northern pact references, and precision-symbol rules.
batches.retry_policy: After approval, generate 1-3 candidates per asset only when needed; keep one final file at output_path and archive retained alternatives in history/ with version suffixes.

output_format_requirements.alpha_policy: forbidden_for_this_card; transparent cutout or SVG/PNG line-control layer must be planned separately for compositing or exact symbols
required_views: top or open-state view when useful
composition_layers: hand or tabletop scale reference layer
precision symbol or line-control note layer
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
physical dimensions and scale references are visible
exact emblems, seals, maps, records, flags, or text-like marks are not invented freely by the image model
card is not used as a transparent cutout substitute
